evals.prompt: How do I create an email campaign in Closum?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on email campaign creation workflow

assertions.name: mentions_drag_and_drop_editor
assertions.description: Mentions drag-and-drop editor for composing emails

assertions.name: mentions_personalization_variables
assertions.description: Mentions personalization variables for customizing email content

assertions.name: mentions_audience_list_or_segmentation
assertions.description: Mentions audience list or contact segmentation for targeting recipients

evals.prompt: I want to set up a WhatsApp automation workflow in Closum that sends a welcome message when someone fills out a form
evals.expected_output: Guidance on combining landing pages/forms with WhatsApp automation

assertions.name: mentions_no_code_automations_or_workflow_builder
assertions.description: Mentions no-code automations or workflow builder for setting up the workflow

assertions.name: mentions_whatsapp_channel
assertions.description: Mentions WhatsApp as a channel for sending automated messages

assertions.name: mentions_form_or_landing_page_trigger
assertions.description: Mentions form or landing page as the trigger for the automation

evals.prompt: How do I use the Closum API to add contacts to an audience list?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on API usage for contact management

assertions.name: mentions_api_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions POST /lead-audience-list endpoint or relevant API endpoint for adding contacts

assertions.name: mentions_bearer_token_auth
assertions.description: Mentions Bearer token authentication for API requests

assertions.name: mentions_api_base_url_or_key_generation
assertions.description: Mentions base URL api.closum.com or API key generation process
